    def test_leave_page(self,page):
        login = LoginPage(page)
        # dashboard = DashboardPage(page)
        leave = LeavePage(page)
    
        login.load()
        login.login("Admin", "admin123")
        leave.verify_leave_click()
        leave.verify_assign_leave()

self = <orange_hrm.pages.leave.LeavePage object at 0x000001C03DC93770>

    def verify_assign_leave_details(self):
            # Employee Name
        emp_field = self.page.get_by_placeholder("Type for hints...")
        emp_field.fill("l")
    
        self.page.wait_for_selector(".oxd-autocomplete-option", timeout=10000)
        self.page.locator(".oxd-autocomplete-option").first.click()
    
        # Leave Type
        dropdown = self.page.locator("div.oxd-select-text").first
        dropdown.click()
        self.page.locator(".oxd-select-option").nth(1).click()
    
        # Date
        date_field = self.page.locator("input[placeholder='yyyy-dd-mm']").first
        date_field.fill("2026-30-05")
    
        # Comment
        self.page.locator("textarea").fill("Automated Leave Assignment")
    
        # Assign submit
        self.page.get_by_role("button", name="Assign").click(no_wait_after=True)
    
        # Wait for confirmation popup and click OK
        ok_btn = self.page.get_by_role("button", name="Ok")
